DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS6-L3-6501000-MSSCI6-STP-LAT-01 | MS Science: Grade 6 | Lunar Phases, Eclipses, and Seasons | Shark Tank Pitch | Latinx / Latin American Experiences
What Abuela Already Knew
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The boy is discussing his opinion about a sky-watching program. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the boy gives to support his opinion. As you listen, you may take notes.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
Why does the boy talk about his abuela's moon calendar?
2QUESTION 2:
Where did the boy learn the science of why the moon seems to change shape?
3QUESTION 3:
According to the boy, why does the moon seem to change shape?
4QUESTION 4:
Why does the boy think his idea is a strong pitch for the judges?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
